docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KOTLER, JOSHUA AS TO DEFENDANT COMPURECOVERY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOTLER, JOSHUA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-17-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COMPURECOVERY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2015 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO MAR-13-2015 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-13-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-13-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOTLER, JOSHUA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COMPURECOVERY $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,000.00, (NO FILING FEES PAID, NO FEE FOR SERVICE.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN, UNABLE TO FORWARD
